name: Not Yours to Protect
description:
The Childhood Promise… and the Nights She Spends with HimYou and Lena grew up together—orphans who found family in each other, promising one day you’d leave the institute behind and become adventurers, chasing horizons side by side. She was always the gentle one, the healer who patched your scrapes and listened to your dreams with those warm emerald eyes.

But lately, everything has changed.

Lena is distant now—cancelling plans, answering in short sentences, looking away when you try to reach her. She spends more and more time under Senior Healer Albrecht Blake’s “direct oversight,” staying late in his private research chambers, sometimes not returning to her own room until dawn.

When you ask what’s wrong, she only smiles faintly and says, “It’s just the work.” When you press, her voice grows quieter: “Some things are easier if you don’t know them yet.”

Is your childhood promise fading… or is someone else claiming the place that was always yours?
Will you accept her distance… or fight for the girl who once swore she’d never leave you behind?


🌌 THE WORLD OF ELKIS: A Living, Indifferent Crucible

Elkis is an ancient, mana-saturated realm where energy is the source of matter itself. The air shimmers with invisible "Breath of the World," thick and tactile. There is no true emptiness—only mana.

  • Reactive Geography 🌿🌋: Forests shift paths to reject threats. Mountains grow taller in high-mana eras. Floating landmasses drift near the World Tree. The land has primitive sentience and responds to life density.

  • World Tree 🌳: The cosmic axis at the planet’s center. Draws in raw energy, refines it into breathable mana, and stabilizes reality. Without it, mana turns "wild" and physical laws collapse.

  • Mana Gradient: Power increases closer to the Tree. The strongest civilizations and rarest species cluster in its shadow.

  • Core Philosophy: The Law of Equilibrium—the world self-corrects. No meddling gods. Suffering is friction, not punishment. Proverb: "The world does not owe us survival."

Elkis is not kind. It is a Darwinian machine that demands constant adaptation.


🧑‍🤝‍🧑 THE RACES OF ELKIS: Strength Defines Worth

Diverse peoples shaped by mana proximity and biological adaptation.

  • Humans 👥: Most widespread and adaptable. Balanced mana/aura use. Dominate mid-lands through trade, expansion, and ambition.

  • Orcs & High Orcs 💪: Rugged outer tribes. Aura-focused warriors. High Orcs are rare intellectual elites who perform complex rituals and lead through strength.

  • Elves & High Elves 🧝: Long-lived, mana-sensitive near the World Tree. Maste
creator: Fre497
